mapper.select: SELECT d.* FROM distributors d WHERE d.id = #{id}
SELECT * FROM distributors WHERE user_id = #{userId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM distributors WHERE invite_code = #{inviteCode} LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(d.id) FROM distributors d
LEFT JOIN users u ON d.user_id = u.id
AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.invite_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
AND d.status = #{status}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO distributors (user_id, level_id, invite_code, total_commission, withdrawable_amount, frozen_amount, total_withdrawn, status, approved, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{levelId}, #{inviteCode}, #{totalCommission}, #{withdrawableAmount}, #{frozenAmount}, #{totalWithdrawn}, #{status}, #{approved}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE distributors SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
